track.name: masked up (feat. YoungBoy Never Broke Again)

wiki.summary: “masked up” marks the first collaboration between Nettspend and the Louisiana rapper YoungBoy Never Broke Again. The instrumental, which was produced by frequent collaborator, CXO, consists of high-pitched synths, hard-hitting bass and drums. Days before the track release, the album’s early tracklist would surface, revealing the YoungBoy Never Broke Again feature. On March 11th, the music video would release to YouTube, after a teaser posted by Nettspend the day prior. Nettspend released “masked up” on March 6, 2026. Read more on Last.fm.
